publications.title: The Telegraph – HMRC’s AI-powered surveillance plans spark Big Brother fears
publications.summary: HMRC is planning to use AI to snoop on taxpayers to send ‘automatic nudges’ and collect more data. This includes reintroducing voice recognition technology to identify taxpayers in real time. HMRC has

blurb: UK civil-liberties campaign group; campaigns and reports on surveillance, facial recognition, and AI in policing/public services.
